enrichment method: CD34 expression tended to be higher in immune-magnetically enriched stem cells
fractionation method: The cellular content was fractionated using the commercially available Mem-PER Plus Membrane Protein Extraction Kit
instrument: using a Dionex UltiMate 3000 RSLCnano system coupled to a Q Exactive HF
labeling: In this Tandem Mass Tag (TMT) 10-plex labelling–based approach
